bassshakertelemetry.config.game_sound_de: E koho i ka polokalamu pāʻani Windows e hoʻohana ai ʻo Minecraft no ka leo pāʻani maʻamau.

bassshakertelemetry.config.page_misc.too: Wehe i nā ʻano like ʻole a me nā hoʻonohonoho paahana.
bassshakertelemetry.config.page_advanced: E wehe i nā koho hoʻokani kiʻekiʻe.
bassshakertelemetry.config.damage_incomi: E ho'ā i nā haptics ke lawe ʻoe i ka pōʻino.
bassshakertelemetry.config.damage_gain.t: Poha ka ikaika o ka poino nui.
E ho'ā i nā haptics ke pā ʻoe i kekahi mea me ka hoʻouka melee.
bassshakertelemetry.config.combat_melee_: Ka ikaika o ka hopena pā melee.
bassshakertelemetry.config.combat_hit_co: E hoʻā i ka manaʻo pane i hoʻopaʻa ʻia e ka server (e manaʻo paha ua lohi a me nā hits kūloko).
Ka ikaika o ka hopena i hōʻoia ʻia e ke kikowaena.
bassshakertelemetry.config.movement_enab: E ho'ā i ke ʻano o ka neʻe ʻana ma muli o ka wikiwiki a me ka wikiwiki.
bassshakertelemetry.config.movement_flig: ʻO ka ikaika kino o ka neʻe ʻana i ka wā e lele ana.
ʻO ka ikaika o ke ea kuhikuhi i ka neʻe ʻana i ka lewa.
bassshakertelemetry.config.movement_swim: Ka ikaika kino o ka neʻe ʻana i ka wā ʻauʻau.
bassshakertelemetry.config.movement_wate: ʻO ka ikaika o ke ʻano wai kuhikuhi i ka wā e neʻe ana i ka wai.
bassshakertelemetry.config.footsteps_ena: E ho'ā i nā haptic kapuaʻi i ka wā e hele ana/holo.
bassshakertelemetry.config.footstep_gain: Ka ikaika o ka hopena kapuaʻi.
bassshakertelemetry.config.mounted_enabl: E ho'ā i nā kapuaʻi wāwae / nā hopena i ka wā e holo ana i nā mauna.
Ka ikaika o ka hopena kapuaʻi i kau ʻia.
bassshakertelemetry.config.sound_haptics: E ho'ā i nā haptic i alakaʻi ʻia e nā leo pāʻani (nā hopena, pahū, etc.).
bassshakertelemetry.config.sound_gain.to: Ka ikaika holoʻokoʻa o nā haptic i hoʻohei ʻia i ke kani.
bassshakertelemetry.config.gameplay_hapt: E ʻae i nā haptic pāʻani synthetic (mining, movement pulses, etc.).
bassshakertelemetry.config.gameplay_gain: ʻO ka ikaika holoʻokoʻa o nā haptic i alakaʻi ʻia i ka pāʻani.
bassshakertelemetry.config.biome_enabled: E ho'ā i nā kani pōkole ke komo i nā biomes hou.
bassshakertelemetry.config.biome_gain.to: Ka ikaika o ka biome chime.
bassshakertelemetry.config.accessibility: Hōʻike i kahi HUD ma ka pale e wehewehe ana i nā haptic hana.
bassshakertelemetry.config.latency_test_: E hoʻomaka i kahi kaʻina pulse hoʻāʻo latency.
bassshakertelemetry.config.demo_run.tool: E holo i kahi kaʻina demo e nānā i nā hopena he nui.
bassshakertelemetry.config.test.tooltip: E pāʻani i kahi hoʻokolohua pōkole no kēia hopena.
bassshakertelemetry.config.road_gain.too: Ka ikaika o ka neʻe mau ʻana.
bassshakertelemetry.config.damage_ms.too: Ka lōʻihi (i loko o nā milliseconds) o ka pohō.
bassshakertelemetry.config.accel_gain.to: Ka ikaika o ka holo wikiwiki ʻana.
bassshakertelemetry.config.accel_ms.tool: Ka lōʻihi (i loko o nā milliseconds) o nā puʻupuʻu wikiwiki.
bassshakertelemetry.config.sound_cooldow: ʻO ka manawa liʻiliʻi ma waena o nā haptic kani.
bassshakertelemetry.config.gameplay_cool: ʻO ka manawa liʻiliʻi ma waena o nā haptics pāʻani pāʻani.
bassshakertelemetry.config.mining_swing_: Ka ikaika o ka hopena swing mining.
bassshakertelemetry.config.mining_period: Ka manawa (i milliseconds) ma waena o ka mining pulse hou.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_buffer: Ka nui hoʻopaʻa leo no ka puka haptics. ʻO nā pale liʻiliʻi liʻiliʻi e hoʻemi i ka latency akā hiki ke pahū ma kekahi mau ʻōnaehana.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_eq_off: E ho'ā i ka kānana EQ pukana.
Hoʻopau i ka kānana EQ hoʻopuka.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_eq_fre: Alanui waena o ke kānana EQ pukana.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_eq_gai: Hoʻonui/ʻoki i ka nui no ka kānana EQ hoʻopuka.
bassshakertelemetry.config.smart_volume_: E ho'ā i ka Smart Volume (hoʻopaʻa 'akomi).
Hoʻohana ʻia e ka Smart Volume.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_tone_30hz: E hoʻokani i kahi leo 30 Hz mau no ke kani ʻana.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_tone_60hz: E hoʻokani i kahi leo 60 Hz mau no ke kani ʻana.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_sweep_20_: E pāʻani i kahi kahili e ʻike i nā resonances a me nā wahi nāwaliwali.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_stop.tool: Hoʻopau i ka hoʻāʻo calibration holo.

bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.title: Kani Leo (7.1)
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.enabled.t: E hoʻā a hoʻopau paha i ke ʻano hoʻokele Sound Scape.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.groups.to: Hoʻoponopono i nā pūʻulu kahawai i hiki ke hoʻohana ʻia ma ke ʻano he ala ala.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.overrides: Hoʻoponopono i nā mea hoʻokele alahele no kēlā me kēia hanana ma muli o nā kī debug.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_add: E hana i pūʻulu Sound Scape hou.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_edi: Hoʻoponopono i nā kahawai o kēia hui.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_del: Holoi i kēia pūʻulu (ʻaʻole hiki ke holoi ʻia ka hui 'All' paʻamau).
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_nam: Ka inoa o kēia pūʻulu (hoʻohana ʻia ma ke ʻano he grp:<name> routing target).
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_cha: E hoʻololi inā hoʻokomo ʻia kēia alahele i ka hui.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.override_: E hana i ka lula hoʻopau hou.
E hoʻopaʻa i ke kī e hoʻohālikelike (ka hoʻohālikelike kikoʻī ʻole ʻole).
E koho i ke ala i hoʻopaʻa ʻia a i ʻole hui no nā hanana like.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.roa: E koho i ka pahu alahele no nā hanana kikokikona neʻe.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.dam: E koho i ka pahu alahele no nā hanana pōʻino.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.bio: E koho i ka pahu alahele no nā hanana biome chime.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.acc: E koho i ka pahu alahele no nā hanana accel bump.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.sou: E koho i ka pahu alahele no nā hanana haptic i hoʻoikaika ʻia i ke kani.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.gam: E koho i ka pahu alahele no nā hanana pāʻani.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.foo: E koho i ka pahu alahele no nā hanana kapuaʻi.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.mou: E koho i ka pahu alahele no nā hanana i kau ʻia/lele.

bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.cus: E koho i ka pahu alahele no nā hanana maʻamau/ ʻē aʻe.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.in: E koho i ka pakuhi mea hana e hoʻoponopono ai.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.re: Hoʻouka hou i nā mea kani mai ka diski (hoʻolei i nā hoʻoponopono i mālama ʻole ʻia).
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.ad: E koho i ke ʻano node e hoʻohui.
Hoʻohui i kahi node hou o ke ʻano i koho ʻia.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.se: E hoʻonoho i ka node i koho ʻia e like me ka mea hoʻopuka.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.sa: E mālama i ka pakuhi mea hana i kēia manawa i ka diski.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.co: E kope i ka mea hana JSON i koho ʻia i ka papa paʻi.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.te: E pāʻani i kahi hoʻokolohua pōkole me ka hoʻohana ʻana i ka pakuhi mea kani o kēia manawa.
